bird.name: Black crake
bird.summary: The black crake (Zapornia flavirostra) is a waterbird in the rail and crake family, Rallidae. It breeds in most of sub-Saharan Africa excep…

locations.name: 撒哈拉沙漠
locations.summary: 撒哈拉沙漠（阿拉伯語：الصحراء الكبرى，aṣ-Ṣaḥrāʾ al-Kubrā ， 清朝直譯大沙漠）位於非洲大陸北部，是世界最热的荒漠，亦是世界第三大荒漠，仅次于南极和北极，同时也是世界上最大的沙漠，其总面积超过9,400,00…

relations.subject: Black crake
relations.evidence: It breeds in most of sub-Saharan Africa except in very arid areas

relations.subject: Black crake
relations.evidence: The habitat of this common to abundant species is freshwater marshes of all types, as long as there is some vegetation to provide cover
relations.object_summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

relations.subject: Black crake
relations.evidence: It has benefited from human activity in the form of deforestation, and is rarely hunted because of its unpalatable flesh
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
